title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
steps: Boil the spaghetti in salted water.
Cook pancetta until crisp.
Mix eggs and parmesan.
Combine spaghetti with pancetta and egg mixture.
Season with black pepper and serve.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery.
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices.
Grill the chicken until cooked.
Prepare tomato-based gravy.
Add chicken to gravy and simmer.
Finish with cream and serve.
